summary: The diff implements comprehensive error handling, logging, and mobile compatibility improvements to address the deployment loading issue. An ErrorBoundary component was added, PlayerProvider and App.tsx were enhanced with error handling and logging, and frontend/index.html was updated with a loading screen and error display mechanisms. However, the diff does not provide evidence of backend verification (REQ-46) or multi-browser mobile testing (REQ-47).

missing_requirements.requirement: Verify that the backend canister in backend/main.mo compiles successfully and deploys without errors, ensuring all query functions and mutations are accessible
missing_requirements.reason: No changes to backend/main.mo or evidence of backend compilation/deployment verification are present in the diff

missing_requirements.requirement: Test the deployed Version 44 on multiple mobile browsers (Safari, Chrome, Firefox) to identify browser-specific issues that may cause the loading problem
missing_requirements.reason: No test results, browser compatibility documentation, or polyfills/fallbacks for browser-specific features are present in the diff
